epigraph.quote: When God works he works to the sound of Bach, when he eavesdrops he listens to the angels who listen to Mozart.

moments.quote: We delivered lights to Strat ford & reached __Chipping Campden__ at 3.30.
reached __Chipping Campden__ at 3.30., where Simon is chatting to William Welsch.
Charles stood for applause, with 3 other brass players at the end of the William Tell Overture.
They had telephoned us at __Welshpool__ to ask about shopping.
